market_landscape.broad_market: AI-assisted content creation and marketing technology

market_segments.positioning: Post-process AI text to bypass detection
Replace human copywriters with AI-generated copy

world_exclusion_bucket.broad_market_excluded: General AI users who are satisfied with default output
world_exclusion_bucket.sub_world_defined: Marketers and copywriters who USE AI but are FRUSTRATED by the quality gap between AI output and what they need to publish/sell
inclusion_criteria: Currently uses AI writing tools (not AI-curious, ACTIVE users)
Has experienced the 'AI slop' problem firsthand
Needs copy that actually converts (not just 'sounds nice')
Has tried at least one solution (prompts, humanizers, tools) that didn't fully work
Values speed AND quality (rejects the false binary)
Willing to invest in a system/method (past free tool phase)
exclusion_criteria: Anti-AI purists who refuse to use AI on principle
Casual users satisfied with ChatGPT defaults
Enterprise teams with dedicated content operations
Students using AI purely for academic bypass
world_exclusion_bucket.recognition_trigger: When they read 'your AI copy all sounds the same and your audience can tell', they should think 'That's EXACTLY my problem'
